# IP-002: Sanitized call chain — safe (sanitizer before cross-function call)
lang: go
file: IP-002-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "path/filepath"
)

func caller() {
    x := r.URL.Query().Get("input")
    safe := filepath.Clean(x)
    callee(safe)
}

func callee(s string) {
    os.Open(s)
}
